title: The Great Gatsby
author: F. Scott Fitzgerald
description: A story of wealth, love, and the American Dream set in the Roaring Twenties.

title: To Kill a Mockingbird
author: Harper Lee
description: A powerful tale of racial injustice and moral growth in the American South.

author: George Orwell
description: A dystopian novel about surveillance, control, and totalitarianism.

title: Clean Code
author: Robert C. Martin
description: A handbook of agile software craftsmanship and writing clean, maintainable code.

title: The Pragmatic Programmer
author: Andrew Hunt & David Thomas
description: A guide to becoming a better and more effective software developer.

title: Introduction to Algorithms
author: Thomas H. Cormen
description: A comprehensive textbook covering a wide range of algorithms in depth.

title: A Brief History of Time
author: Stephen Hawking
description: An overview of cosmology, black holes, and the nature of the universe.

title: The Selfish Gene
author: Richard Dawkins
description: An exploration of evolution from the gene-centered view.

title: The Elegant Universe
author: Brian Greene
description: A deep dive into string theory and the fabric of the cosmos.

title: The Alchemist
author: Paulo Coelho
description: A philosophical story about following your dreams and destiny.

title: You Don't Know JS
author: Kyle Simpson
description: A deep dive into the core mechanisms of JavaScript.

title: Cosmos
author: Carl Sagan
description: A journey through space, time, and the wonders of the universe.
